decisions.decision: Used jest.isolateModules for safeLoadPipelineConfig and classifyLocal tests
decisions.rationale: jest.resetModules + jest.mock hoisting causes CONFIG_DIR_OVERRIDE to leak between describe blocks when pipeline.local.json exists

decisions.decision: Added CONFIG_DIR_OVERRIDE with temp dirs (no local override) to createHaikuClient and local LLM routing test blocks
decisions.rationale: pipeline.local.json sets provider:local which breaks tests expecting provider:anthropic behavior

next_action: Run full test suite to verify test fixes. 14/18 regressions confirmed fixed (integration-pipeline: 7, promote-unrouted: 7). Remaining in pipeline-infra.test.js: safeLoadPipelineConfig (4 tests rewritten with jest.isolateModules), classifyLocal (6 tests rewritten with jest.isolateModules), and 1 'local LLM routing > parse error' test — all need verification run. The parse error test fails within its describe block because mockPipelineConfig does not intercept pipeline.local.json overlay reads; fix is to use the same temp config dir approach already applied to the beforeEach. Pre-existing: 4 createHaikuClient tests NOW FIXED. UAT classification (1) requires running LLM — accepted.
context_notes: Root cause of ALL 18 regressions: T12.2/T12.3 renamed exports (loadVaultPaths→safeLoadVaultPaths, loadPipelineConfig→safeLoadPipelineConfig) but test mocks in 3 files were not updated. Secondary: pipeline.local.json (provider:local, model:qwen/qwen3.6-27b) causes test pollution via CONFIG_DIR overlay — tests loading real config dir get local LLM routing instead of Anthropic. Fix: (1) added missing mock exports to integration-pipeline and promote-unrouted, (2) isolated config dirs for createHaikuClient and local LLM routing blocks, (3) jest.isolateModules for safeLoadPipelineConfig and classifyLocal. Grep verifications passed: no fs.promises.writeFile in writeDeadLetter, no standalone loadVaultPaths in source.
